metadata.title: Agent Studio | LIA — WeDo Talent
metadata.description: Create sourcing agents from sector templates. Configure calibration and automation.
metadata.layoutDescription: Create and manage intelligent sourcing agents

studio.title: Agent Studio
studio.virtualRecruiter: A virtual recruiter that works for you
studio.virtualRecruiterDesc: Agents are AI bots that search, filter, and rank candidates automatically based on your criteria. You teach once, and it works 24/7.

flowSteps.chooseProfileDesc: Select the sector or type of professional you are looking for
flowSteps.configureAgentDesc: Set preferences, skills, and link to a job or talent pool
flowSteps.teachByEvaluatingDesc: Evaluate 3+ profiles for the agent to learn your selection criteria
flowSteps.receiveCandidatesDesc: The agent searches and filters candidates 24/7, you only evaluate the best

templates.description: Pre-configured templates with sector-specific evaluation criteria

twins.label: Digital Twins
twins.headerDesc: A Digital Twin is an AI agent that learns a team specialist's evaluation pattern and offers an automatic second opinion on new candidates.

emptyState.title: No Digital Twin created yet
emptyState.description: Create a Twin from the historical decisions of your best evaluator.
emptyState.noExperience: No technical background? No problem — {aiAssistant} walks you through it step by step.

createModal.title: Create Digital Twin
createModal.subtitle: Configure the specialist whose reasoning will be cloned to support screening.
createModal.namePlaceholder: e.g. Ana's Twin — Senior Tech Recruiter
createModal.nameHelp: Use the team specialist's name or the role being cloned.
createModal.specialtyPlaceholder: e.g. Technical screening for backend roles
createModal.specialtyHelp: What kind of evaluation this Twin is best at.
createModal.descPlaceholder: Main criteria the specialist uses, red flags, ideal profiles…
createModal.descHelp: The more context, the better the Twin learns the pattern.
createModal.decisionsUploadCta: Click to upload a CSV file with decisions
createModal.decisionsFormats: CSV up to 5 MB · expected columns: candidate, decision, rationale
createModal.decisionsHelp: More past decisions means the Twin starts more accurate.
createModal.fileTooLargeDesc: The decisions CSV must be 5 MB or smaller.
createModal.successDesc: Ready to start supporting your screenings.
createModal.errorDesc: Please try again in a moment — if it persists, contact support.

lgpd.summary: This feature indexes historical decisions under LGPD Art. 6 + 11 + 18. View details.

detail.indexing: This feature indexes historical decisions (approvals, rejections, rationales) from the chosen evaluator so the AI learns the pattern and offers an automatic second opinion.
detail.storage: Stores references to the candidate (candidate_id) and snapshots without direct PII (no name), under LGPD Art. 6 + Art. 11. Embeddings derive from the evaluator's rationale, not from the candidate's personal data.
detail.confirmation: By confirming you attest that (1) candidates were informed of behavioral analysis in the process (LGPD Art. 11); (2) the evaluator authorized using the decisions as training data; (3) the system preserves the right to erasure (LGPD Art. 18) — the twin reference is anonymized via FK SET NULL when the candidate requests removal.

lgpd.confirmAria: I acknowledge LGPD and continue to creation

twins.subheader: A Digital Twin is an AI agent that learns a team specialist's evaluation pattern and offers an automatic second opinion on new candidates.

kanban.staleTooltip: Stalled for {days} days — consider advancing or providing feedback
kanban.reschedulePrompt: The recruiter wants to change the interview time for {name} scheduled for {date}. Ask for the new preferred date and time and confirm the rescheduling with the candidate.
kanban.cancelPrompt: The recruiter wants to cancel the interview for {name} scheduled for {date}. Ask which stage they want to move the candidate to (or keep in the same) and confirm the cancellation.
kanban.manageInterviewPrompt: The recruiter wants to manage the interview of {name} scheduled for {date}. Ask if they want to change the time (request new date/time) or cancel. If canceling, ask which stage they want to move the candidate to.
kanban.degradedModeTooltip: Degraded analysis mode — open the report for details

kanban.jobPublishedDesc: The job is active. Share the link below with candidates:
kanban.linkCopiedDesc: The link has been copied to clipboard.
kanban.copyFailedDesc: Select the link manually and copy.
kanban.liaAnalysisText: Candidate automatically evaluated by LIA based on experience criteria, skills and job profile fit. The screening considers factors such as professional history, academic background and declared technical skills.
kanban.testDetailsText: Technical evaluation through practical testing focused on the technical skills required for the position. Includes code analysis, problem solving and knowledge of specific tools.
kanban.proficiencyText: English proficiency assessment covering written comprehension, oral expression and technical vocabulary relevant to the position.
kanban.moveToNewStage: Move candidate to a new process stage
kanban.reasonPlaceholder: E.g.: Interview scheduled for next Tuesday...
kanban.howCanIHelp: How can I help you today?
kanban.candidatesSelectedCount: {count, plural, one {# candidate selected} other {# candidates selected}}
kanban.clickReplaceInstruction: Click "Replace" to swap the selected question
kanban.suggestionTech1: How do you structure a scalable Design System for multiple platforms?
kanban.suggestionTech2: Describe your experience with user research methods and how you apply them
kanban.suggestionTech3: How do you measure the ROI of UX initiatives in digital products?
kanban.suggestionTech4: What is your approach to responsive design and accessibility?
kanban.suggestionTech5: How do you collaborate with developers to ensure faithful design implementation?
kanban.suggestionSoft1: How do you handle tight deadlines and multiple simultaneous deliverables?
kanban.suggestionSoft2: Describe a team conflict situation you resolved successfully
kanban.suggestionSoft3: How do you stay updated with trends and technologies in the field?
kanban.suggestionSoft4: What was your biggest professional challenge and how did you overcome it?
kanban.suggestionSoft5: How do you prioritize multiple demands from different stakeholders?
kanban.questionUX1: Which research method would be most appropriate to validate the usability of an early-stage prototype?
kanban.questionUX1optA: A) A/B test with large sample
kanban.questionUX2: How would you prioritize features in an MVP using the effort vs impact matrix?
kanban.questionUX2optA: A) High impact and low effort first ✓
kanban.questionUX2optB: B) High effort and high impact first
kanban.questionUX2optC: C) Low effort regardless of impact
kanban.questionUX3: What is the fundamental difference between Design System and Style Guide?
kanban.questionUX3optA: A) There is no difference, they are synonyms
kanban.questionUX3optB: B) Design System includes components and patterns, Style Guide focuses on visual ✓
kanban.questionUX3optC: C) Style Guide is more complete than Design System
kanban.questionUX3optD: D) Design System is only for developers

testPreview.title: Technical Test - UX Design

invite.title: Send WSI Screening Invite
invite.addToJobOnSend: When sending, the candidate will be automatically added to the selected job at the {stage} stage
invite.emailSentViaSystem: Email will be sent via system
invite.whatsappOpenInBrowser: WhatsApp will be opened in browser
invite.emailPlusWhatsapp: Email sent via system + WhatsApp opened in browser
invite.phoneScriptTemplate:
📞 CALL SCRIPT - LIA

[Start of call] "Hello, good morning/afternoon! I am LIA, virtual assistant of the recruitment team at [Company].

I am calling for {name} regarding the selection process for the position of {job}.

[If the person confirms identity]

Great to speak with you! I would like to conduct a quick screening, which takes approximately 15 to 20 minutes. Can I proceed now or would you prefer I call back at another time?

[If yes, proceed]

Perfect! Before we begin, I need to inform you that this conversation will be recorded for evaluation purposes, in accordance with our privacy policy. Do you agree to proceed?

[After confirmation]

Great! I will ask some questions about your experience and way of working. You can answer calmly, there is no right or wrong answer.

[Start screening questions]"

globalSearch.controlsAccess: Controls access to global candidate search across the entire platform.
globalSearch.whenEnabled: When enabled, you have access to:
globalSearch.enabledTalentFunnel: Talent Funnel: "Hybrid" and "Global" search options in the search prompt
globalSearch.enabledSearchResults: Search Results: Global and hybrid expansion icons in expanded prompt
globalSearch.enabledJobCreation: Job Creation: LIA can search external candidates for calibration and sourcing
globalSearch.enabledAutoSourcing: Auto Sourcing: Expansion to global base when local database is insufficient
globalSearch.enabledContactReveal: Contact Reveal: Option to reveal emails and phones (1 credit + $0.01 Apify/candidate)
globalSearch.disabledTalentFunnel: Talent Funnel: Only "Local" search available (own database)
globalSearch.disabledSearchResults: Search Results: Global/hybrid search icons will be hidden
globalSearch.disabledJobCreation: Job Creation: LIA will only use candidates from your database for calibration
globalSearch.disabledAutoSourcing: Auto Sourcing: Disabled - no expansion to external database
globalSearch.disabledSavings: Savings: No global search credits will be consumed
globalSearch.reactivateAnytime: You can reactivate global search at any time.
globalSearch.revealEmailsCost: +2 credits per candidate with email revealed
globalSearch.revealPhonesCost: +14 credits per candidate with phone revealed
globalSearch.prioritizeFreshDesc: Candidates active in the last 90 days
globalSearch.suggestGlobalExpansionDesc: When local search returns few results
globalSearch.costsNote: Note: Costs are estimates based on the configured limit. Actual cost may vary depending on applied filters and candidate availability.
globalSearch.maxCostNote: * Maximum cost includes all enabled options (Freshness + Emails + Phones)
globalSearch.localSearchFreeDesc: Searches in the local database (already registered candidates) are free. The Apify costs above apply only to Hybrid or Global searches.

techStackTab.engineeringPlaceholder: Describe the company's engineering culture (methodologies, development practices, technical work environment)...

culturePreview.title: Identified Cultural Profile
culturePreview.antiBotDescription: The company website uses dynamic loading (JavaScript/SPA) that doesn't allow automatic reading. Click "Edit" above to manually fill in the information by copying from the company website.
culturePreview.bigFiveDescription: The Big Five model is the most validated scientific methodology for personality analysis, widely used in organizational psychology.
culturePreview.opennessDesc: Low = traditional, rigid processes. High = innovative, experimental, creative.
culturePreview.conscientiousnessDesc: Low = informal, flexible. High = structured, organized, quality-focused.
culturePreview.extraversionDesc: Low = individual work, introspection. High = collaborative, communicative, teamwork.
culturePreview.agreeablenessDesc: Low = competitive, results-focused. High = empathetic, people-focused, diversity.
culturePreview.stabilityDesc: Low = dynamic, high pressure, frequent changes. High = calm, predictable, low stress environment.
culturePreview.bigFiveNoteText: This profile is generated by inference from the company's website analysis and does not guarantee accuracy. For greater precision, we recommend the company applies a validated organizational culture assessment to define their profile.

governanca.title: Governance
governanca.description: Audit logs, bias audit, automation rules, policy engine, DSR/LGPD and consent.

aiPerformance.title: AI Performance
aiPerformance.description: Canonical A/B testing with Thompson Sampling, Bonferroni multi-arm correction, Sequential Testing (Pocock alpha-spending) and FairnessGate L3 (T-19).

empty.posteriors: No persisted Thompson posteriors for this experiment.

bandit.explanation: Bayesian Beta posteriors per arm. α/β updated on each observation; expected value = α / (α + β).

earlyStop.explanation: Pocock alpha-spending sequential testing: alpha_per_look = alpha_total / max_looks. Lets you peek without inflating Type I error.

biasAudit.description: Bias audits (Four-Fifths Rule) executed across jobs.
biasAudit.drillDownHelp: Enter a job ID to view the Four-Fifths audit per dimension.
biasAudit.annualHelp: Generates the canonical annual report required by NYC Local Law 144 (Four-Fifths Rule + chi-square + EEOC). $1,500/day fine per AEDT for non-compliance.
biasAudit.annualEmpty: No annual reports yet. Click "Generate Annual Report" for the current year.
biasAudit.trustHelp: Publishes the annual report at a public URL for clients/auditors (HireVue/Eightfold pattern). NYC LL144 §20-871 compliant.
biasAudit.trustNoReport: No annual report available yet. Generate one in the Annual Report tab first.
biasAudit.trustToggleHelp: When enabled, the report is visible at trust.wedotalent.cc without authentication.
biasAudit.trustDisclaimer: Publishing this report satisfies the NYC Local Law 144 requirement (effective July/2026) of making the Automated Employment Decision Tool (AEDT) bias audit public, including Four-Fifths Rule + chi-square statistical significance + EEOC adverse impact analysis.

automationRules.description: Automation rules triggered by system events.

policyEngine.description: Compliance policies enforced by the platform.
policyEngine.applySectorHelp: Applies the default policy bundle for the chosen sector to this company.

trainingData.heading: Company Consent — Training Data Use (RLHF)
trainingData.description: Allows recruiter conversations with LIA to be used to fine-tune the Claude model via AWS Bedrock, generating a custom model exclusive to your company.
trainingData.disclaimerAnon: Data is anonymized (PII stripped across 4 layers) before any export.
trainingData.disclaimerCrossBorder: Cross-border transfer via AWS Bedrock (DPA pending legal — LGPD Art. 33).
trainingData.disclaimerCustomModel: Custom WeDOTalent model — not shared with other companies or Anthropic.
trainingData.revokeConfirmBody: This blocks new exports for fine-tune (LGPD Art. 18). Already-trained models remain active in your AWS Bedrock account.

nps.defaultQuestion: On a scale of 0 to 10, how likely are you to recommend our company as a place to work?

aiPreview.questionDev: How many candidates do we have for the Developer position?
aiPreview.answerProfessional: Currently, the Senior Developer position has 23 active candidates in the pipeline. Of these, 8 are in screening, 10 in technical interview and 5 awaiting final interview. Can I detail the profile of any specific candidate?
aiPreview.answerCasual: We have 23 candidates! 8 in screening, 10 in technical and 5 almost at the end. Want me to highlight the top 3?
aiPreview.answerDetailed: The Senior Developer position (#DEV-042) has 23 candidates distributed across 3 stages: Screening (8 — 65% conversion rate), Technical Interview (10 — average WSI score 4.2/5), Final Interview (5 — all with score >85%). Compared to market, the funnel is 15% above average.

workforce.pasteDialogDesc: Paste a table with header. Accepted columns: department, role, quantity, deadline, seniority.
workforce.pastePlaceholder:
Department	Role	Quantity	Deadline	Seniority
Engineering	Backend	3	Q2	Mid
workforce.importDescription: Import the annual hiring plan by department and month. LIA analyzes and suggests adjustments based on historical data.
workforce.departmentsDesc: Departments integrated with Company and Team. New departments are created automatically.
workforce.trackingDesc: Actual tracking will be displayed in performance dashboards.

webhooks.title: External webhooks
webhooks.description: Receive Agent Studio events in external systems (Zapier, Slack, your CRM). Each delivery is signed with HMAC-SHA256 via the X-WeDO-Signature header.
webhooks.noneHint: Create a webhook to receive your agents' events in external systems
webhooks.name: Name
webhooks.secretWarningDesc: For security, it will NOT be shown again. Use it to verify the HMAC-SHA256 signature.
webhooks.createdToastDesc: Copy the secret below (it is shown only once)
webhooks.urlMustBeHttps: The URL must start with https://

liaFields.title: LIA Field Instructions
liaFields.description: Configure how LIA should interpret each company field. Toggles define if AI can suggest/fill; instructions customize behavior.

tenantOverride.title: Tenant Override (YAML)
tenantOverride.disclaimer: Tenant override modifications are per-company and hot-reload within 30 seconds. Automatic backup retained. Revert via Delete.
tenantOverride.empty: No active override - all prompts use canonical.
tenantOverride.confirmDelete: Remove override and revert to canonical default?

pipeline.title: Pipeline Stage Templates Manager
pipeline.validationLabel: Label must have at least 2 characters

alert.title: Alert Rules Manager (Notifications)
alert.emptyList: No alert rule in this category.
alert.validationLabel: Label must have at least 3 characters
alert.validationEventType: Event type must be slug (a-z, 0-9, _, ., e.g., candidate.applied)

integration.title: Integrations Manager
integration.validationLabel: Label must have at least 2 characters

webhook.title: Webhook Events Manager
webhook.emptyList: No event type in this category.
webhook.validationLabel: Label must have at least 3 characters

auditSummary.title: Audit Summary (last 30 days)
auditSummary.description: High-level view of LGPD events in the last 30 days. For full drill-down, contact compliance@wedotalent.cc.
auditSummary.totalEventsHint: Includes all severities. Drill-down available only to WeDOTalent staff.
auditSummary.needDeepDiveBody: Contact our compliance team to access the full audit log with filters, per-event drill-down and CSV/JSON exports.

fairnessGuardStatus.title: FairnessGuard active
fairnessGuardStatus.subtitle: Automatic algorithmic bias blocking (LGPD Art. 20 + EU AI Act). Always on, not configurable.

auditDrillDown.title: Detailed audit logs
auditDrillDown.subtitle: Full history of data access and changes in your tenant (LGPD Art. 9 + Art. 37 V).
auditDrillDown.notAdminBody: Only tenant admin can view detailed audit logs. Request access from your company administrator.
auditDrillDown.forbiddenByBackend: Server denied permission (LGPD Art. 9). Check your profile.
auditDrillDown.retentionNote: Logs retained 7 years (SOX Section 802 + LGPD). Use filter to refine search.

password.title: Change Password
password.description: Enter your current password and new password to change it.
password.errorMinLength: New password must be at least 8 characters
password.errorGeneric: Error changing password. Please check your current password.

welcomeCard.defaultWelcome: I'll guide you through your screening for this role. The conversation will cover your experience and skills in an objective way.
welcomeCard.consentText: I agree to the processing of my personal data for the purposes of this screening, in line with the
welcomeCard.noChannels: This screening doesn't have any contact channel enabled. Please ask the recruiter to review the configuration.
welcomeCard.voiceAria: Start voice conversation in the browser

completionCard.title: Screening successfully completed!
completionCard.thanks: Thank you, {name}! Your responses have been recorded.

phoneCallDone.title: Call requested
phoneCallDone.description: You'll receive a call from LIA shortly. Keep an eye on your phone.
phoneCallDone.voipPrompt: Or call directly from your browser:

confirmationCard.title: We've reached the end!
confirmationCard.subtitle: Want to review anything before finishing?

phoneConfirmModal.whatsappDescription: Confirm your WhatsApp number. We'll open a conversation so you can continue the screening by message.
phoneConfirmModal.phoneDescription: Enter your phone number to receive a call from LIA. The screening will be conducted by voice.

voipCallButton.callIdleTitle: Start voice call from the browser
voipCallButton.unavailableTitle: Voice call not available right now

errors.microphoneUnavailable: Microphone unavailable. Check your browser permissions.
errors.voipUnavailable: Voice call unavailable. Please use the text chat.
errors.networkError: Network error while starting voice session

landing.title: WeDo Admin
landing.subtitle: Provisional internal area for features that will move to the external WeDOTalent admin panel (admin2.wedotalent.cc) when it is ready. Access restricted to WeDOTalent staff.

fairness.title: Fairness Dashboards
fairness.description: Bias rate, audit drill-down and CSV/JSON exports. EU AI Act metrics.

auditLogs.title: Audit Logs (drill-down)
auditLogs.description: Interactive viewer for LGPD audit events with filters by event, actor, severity and period.

aiTransparency.title: AI Transparency
aiTransparency.description: Override reasons and AI decision traceability (EU AI Act Art. 13/14 + Annex III).

policyEngine.title: Policy Engine
policyEngine.description: Compliance policy configuration per sector and canonical rules.

aiPerformance.title: AI Performance
aiPerformance.description: Canonical A/B testing (Thompson + Bonferroni + Sequential + FairnessGate) — T-19.

dashboard.title: Fairness Dashboard
dashboard.description: Consolidated view of FairnessGuard blocks and alerts by category and period.
dashboard.noIncidentsDesc: No blocks or alerts were recorded by FairnessGuard.

bar.expandAriaLabel: Expand workflow bar and see next steps

publishJob.desc: Make the job visible to candidates

generateJD.title: Generate JD with AI
generateJD.desc: LIA writes the job description automatically

addToList.desc: Include candidates in this job pipeline
